inspectionMethod: Manual rock test and dial indicator measurement
notes: Lower fork bushing wears from fuselage oscillation and lateral loads on approach.

displayName: Wing strut fork bushing (upper at wing, left)
inspectionMethod: Manual rock test and dial indicator measurement at wing root
notes: Upper fork bushing at wing root subjected to bending moment and torsion loads.

inspectionMethod: Manual rock test and dial indicator measurement
notes: Right-side lower fork bushing mirrored wear pattern to left side.

displayName: Wing strut fork bushing (upper at wing, right)
inspectionMethod: Manual rock test and dial indicator measurement at wing root
notes: Right-side upper fork bushing at wing root mirrored to left side.

inspectionMethod: Eddy-current inspection or ultrasonic thickness survey
notes: Internal corrosion occurs from moisture ingress and inadequate drainage.

inspectionMethod: Eddy-current inspection or ultrasonic thickness survey
notes: Right-side strut internal corrosion mirrored to left side.

displayName: Wing strut attach bolt torque retention (left)
inspectionMethod: Torque wrench check at 50-hour intervals
notes: Bolts loosen due to vibration and bending moment cycling.

displayName: Wing strut attach bolt torque retention (right)
inspectionMethod: Torque wrench check at 50-hour intervals
notes: Right-side bolt retention mirrored to left side.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection with flashlight and tactile probe
notes: Fairing seal degrades from UV exposure and thermal cycling.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection with flashlight and tactile probe
notes: Right-side fairing seal mirrored to left side.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and shadow photography
notes: Oil-canning is cosmetic but indicates stress cycling; severe deformation raises fatigue risk.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and shadow photography
notes: Right-side oil-canning mirrored to left side.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and surface probe
notes: Leading edge dents from ground contact, hail, and maintenance mishaps.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and surface probe
notes: Right-side leading edge dent count mirrored to left side.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection with dye penetrant if suspected leak
notes: Sealant hardens and cracks from thermal cycling; fuel seepage leads to corrosion.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection with dye penetrant if suspected leak
notes: Right-side tank bay sealant mirrored to left side.

inspectionMethod: Remove cap and visual inspection; compression test with shim gauge
notes: O-ring degradation allows water vapor ingress and fuel water contamination.

inspectionMethod: Remove cap and visual inspection; compression test with shim gauge
notes: Right-side O-ring mirrored to left side.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of vent exit and blow-through test with low pressure
notes: Vent obstruction from mud dauber nests, ice, or corrosion particles causes tank venting failure.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of vent exit and blow-through test with low pressure
notes: Right-side vent obstruction mirrored to left side.

displayName: Wing tip nav light housing crack count (left)
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection with strong light behind housing
notes: Plastic housing cracks from vibration and temperature stress; water ingress causes corrosion.

displayName: Wing tip nav light housing crack count (right)
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection with strong light behind housing
notes: Right-side nav light housing crack count mirrored to left side.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection for cracks, corrosion, and heat discoloration
notes: Firewall corrosion and cracking from exhaust heat cycling and moisture exposure.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of sealant around penetrations and cracks
notes: Firewall sealant failure allows exhaust gases and CO to enter cabin.

inspectionMethod: Dye penetrant or eddy-current inspection of all tube welds
notes: Fatigue cracks initiate at weld stress concentrations and propagate under vibration.

displayName: Engine mount rubber isolator sag (all four isolators)
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection with level and straightedge, or dial indicator
notes: Isolator degradation increases engine vibration and transmits oscillation to airframe.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of tube condition and fastener security
notes: Scat tube insulation degrades and tube develops corrosion and cracks.

displayName: Cabin heat scat tube CO leak risk
inspectionMethod: Inspection for cracks, holes, and loose fasteners; CO testing if suspected
notes: Leaking scat tube allows exhaust gas and CO to bypass cabin heat to ambient air.

inspectionMethod: Manual rock test of yoke and dial indicator measurement at mounting
notes: Yoke bushing wear increases control friction and looseness from repetitive pulling loads.

inspectionMethod: Manual rock test of yoke and dial indicator measurement at mounting
notes: Right-side yoke bushing wear mirrored to left side.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and roughness gauge; manual slide test
notes: Seat rail wear from repeated adjustment and landing impact vibration.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and roughness gauge; manual slide test
notes: Right-side seat rail wear mirrored to left side.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection for color fading and tensile test of cut sample if needed
notes: Seat belt webbing degrades from sun exposure; loss of strength compromises occupant protection.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and feel of latch engagement when closing
notes: Latch wear from repeated opening and closing; worn latch cannot secure door on landing.

inspectionMethod: Torque wrench check; visual inspection for corrosion under bolt heads
notes: Stabilizer attach bolts loosen from vibration cycling and pitch moment loads.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection for cracks, corrosion, and paint condition
notes: Top surface corrodes from rain, dust, and bird droppings; UV damages paint.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection for cracks, corrosion, and paint condition
notes: Bottom surface also exposed to weather and debris; lap joint corrosion common.

inspectionMethod: Dye penetrant inspection of all attach lugs
notes: Attach lugs experience stress concentration from yaw loads and landing impact.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection for cracks, corrosion, and damage
notes: Fin skin corrodes and cracks from weather exposure and yaw oscillation stress.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and ultrasonic thickness survey if corrosion suspected
notes: Bulkhead hidden corrosion results from standing water and poor drainage in tail cone.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of tray fasteners and corrosion; manual pull test
notes: ELT security compromised by fastener corrosion and impact damage; tray separation risk.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection; photograph in raking light if borderline
notes: Acrylic windshield crazes from thermal cycling and UV exposure; replace at 30%.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection for hardening and cracks; feel for compression loss
notes: Rubber seal hardens from UV and thermal cycling; water leakage into cabin.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection for degradation and compression set
notes: Door seal compression loss allows air leaks and cabin noise during flight.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection for degradation and compression set
notes: Copilot door seal mirrored to pilot door seal.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and feel of latch engagement; full-close door test
notes: Latch wear from repeated opening/closing and landing shock; insufficient engagement risk.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and feel of latch engagement; full-close door test
notes: Copilot door latch wear mirrored to pilot door.

inspectionMethod: Manual rock test of door and dial indicator at hinge
notes: Upper hinge bushing wear from door weight and repeated opening; door sag ensues.

inspectionMethod: Manual rock test of door and dial indicator at hinge
notes: Lower hinge bushing wear supports door weight; combined with upper wear causes sag.

inspectionMethod: Manual rock test of door and dial indicator at hinge
notes: Copilot door upper hinge bushing wear mirrored to pilot door.

inspectionMethod: Manual rock test of door and dial indicator at hinge
notes: Copilot door lower hinge bushing wear mirrored to pilot door.

displayName: Window crank cable wear (both doors combined)
inspectionMethod: Manual operation of crank handles and visual inspection of cable condition
notes: Cable wear from repeated window opening and closing; excessive play leads to crank slippage.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of carpet condition and pile wear
notes: Carpet wears from foot traffic and dirt ingress; replacement is preventive maintenance.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and gentle push test of headliner panels
notes: Headliner attachment glue fails from thermal cycling and adhesive degradation.

inspectionMethod: Manual latch operation and visual inspection of engagement
notes: Glove box latch wears from repeated opening and landing shock.

inspectionMethod: Manual sun visor articulation test
notes: Pivot bearing lubricant dries; visor loses ability to hold position in flight.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of all placards from normal operating positions
notes: Placard text fades from UV and thermal cycling; illegible placards pose regulatory and safety risk.

inspectionMethod: Hand rub test on surfaces; collect chalk on tissue
notes: UV degradation breaks down binder and exposes pigment; chalking indicates protective film loss.

inspectionMethod: Visual count of chips on representative leading edge sections
notes: Leading edge paint chips expose aluminum to corrosion; bare spots trigger repaint at 50 chips.

inspectionMethod: Borescope inspection of drain holes and access panels; weight check for moisture
notes: Hidden corrosion in lower fuselage bays results from standing water and poor ventilation.

displayName: Corrosion index control surface trailing edges
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection and tap test of trailing edges; eddy-current survey if suspected
notes: Control surface trailing edge corrosion traps moisture in closed cells; pitting accelerates.

displayName: Static wick condition (all six wicks combined)
inspectionMethod: Resistance check at each wick tip with megohmmeter; visual inspection for corrosion
notes: Static wick resistance increases from corrosion and material degradation; replace if below 50 MΩ.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of antenna mounts for white corrosion and water entry
notes: Water ingress at antenna base causes connector corrosion and signal loss.

inspectionMethod: Ultrasonic thickness survey at known corrosion hot spots
notes: Galvanic corrosion in lap joints initiates from dissimilar metals and moisture trapping.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of attach eye and pin hole condition; measure hole diameter
notes: Attach point wears from repeated towing and ground handling; hole enlargement risks detachment.

displayName: Tiedown ring corrosion (wing L, wing R, tail combined)
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection for corrosion and pitting; pull test with load gauge if suspected
notes: Tiedown rings corrode from salt spray and moisture; rust reduces attachment strength.

displayName: Nose tow steering limit stop wear
inspectionMethod: Measure clearance between stop and steering arm at full deflection
notes: Steering stop wear allows excessive nose gear deflection and impact damage.

inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of fasteners and stowage brackets; pull test
notes: Chock stowage hardware loosens from vibration and landing shock; detachment is foreign object hazard.
